title: SONGMICS Kitchen Cupboard Organisers, Set of 3 Counter Storage Shelves, Stackable, Expandable Spice Racks, Metal and Engineered Wood, Cloud White and Natural Beige KCS014YL02
features: 【AMPLE STORAGE】Optimise your countertop area with these spice racks, designed to keep your cooking essentials like spice jars, containers, cans, utensils, and cookbooks organised, easily visible, and quick to find
【FLEXIBLE DESIGN】These cupboard organisers come in 3 different sizes and can be stacked, nested, used separately, or arranged in an L-shape to perfectly fit your cabinet space
【STURDY AND DURABLE】Constructed from premium engineered wood and metal, each cabinet shelf organiser can hold up to 5 kg, allowing you to store daily supplies confidently

【MULTIPURPOSE USE】Not just for the kitchen! Use these counter storage shelves to elevate your dining table centerpiece in the restaurant, organise makeup on your bedroom desk, or store toiletries in the bathroom
【EASY TO ASSEMBLE】With a simple structure and clear instructions, these spice racks can be easily assembled, ensuring you can start to organise your space quickly
description: Product Description Specifications: Colour: Cloud White, Natural Beige Material: Metal, Engineered Wood Large Shelf Size: 7.7"D x 11.7"W x 6.2"H (19.5 x 29.7 x 15.8 cm) Middle Shelf Size: 7.3"D x 11.7"W x 5.4"H (18.5 x 29.7 x 13.7 cm) Small Shelf Size: 6.9"D x 11.7"W x 4.6"H (17.5 x 29.7 x 11.6 cm) Total Weight: 4.6 lb (2.1 kg) Max. Static Load Capacity of Each Shelf: 11 lb (5 kg) Package Contents: 3 x Cabinet Shelf 1 x Accessory Kit 1 x Instructions
